name: auto-google-analytics
description: Autonomous Google Analytics 4 for any project: when enabled, /auto-google-analytics detects the stack & hosting type, provisions the GA4 property + web stream via a service-account key (no browser login), injects the gtag + Consent Mode v2 + blanket ui_click snippet into source, verifies a real hit reaches GA4 browser-free (Measurement Protocol + realtime), and records the Measurement ID in a project-local inventory. Bundles the proven analytics-setup skill + instrumentation rule + cross-platform reference so it works with NO other hub files. The one-time service-account key is the only human prerequisite (Google blocks automation login); without it it falls back to guided manual setup. Toggleable via auto-google-analytics-settings.json (master switch + per-feature, re-read each session).
